title: Senior Financial Analyst - National Insurance Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - National Insurance Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
National Insurance Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
